posts.author: CarrieKayser (Carrie Kayser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Monday automations to send task reminders via Slack.
Can Slack emoji be used to update item status in Monday?

What are you trying to achieve

we’ve set up automations to send task reminders via Slack. Is there anything we can use that would let a person add an emoji in Slack, like the check mark emoji, which would update the monday item as done?
